title: The Glitch in the Family Photo
hook: I found a 1994 polaroid of my parents that breaks reality.
setup: They were at a restaurant. I was flipping through the wedding album when the background caught my eye.
escalation: A man stands behind them. He is wearing sleek, modern wireless earbuds. They didn't exist thirty years ago.
climax: I checked the physical print with a loupe. The man's face is blurred, like a corrupted digital file on paper.
ending: Tell me how a physical 1994 print has a digital rendering glitch.
visualMoments: Hand flipping through aged, yellowing photo album pages
Close-up of the original polaroid in soft light
Extreme digital zoom on the man in the background
Magnifying glass moving over the distorted, pixelated face
Creator looking directly into camera with intense expression
